description_long: This object is a stylized sunflower with a large, circular brown center surrounded by two distinct layers of yellow petals arranged in a radial pattern. The petals are broad, pointed, and slightly overlapping, giving the flower a full and symmetrical appearance. The stem is straight, slender, and green, supporting the flower head upright. Two green leaves, broad and ovate in shape, extend from the lower part of the stem, one on each side. The surface of the petals and leaves appears matte and slightly textured, resembling the natural look of a sunflower. The overall form is simple yet recognizable, making it suitable for decorative or illustrative use in urban parks, gardens, or sidewalk planters.
description: A stylized sunflower with a large brown center, yellow pointed petals in two layers, a straight green stem, and two broad green leaves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the sunflower, with all petals, the brown center, and both green leaves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the flower head and the layering of petals, with the stem and one leaf visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the petals, the straight stem, and both leaves extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the flower head, the stem, and the other leaf.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration with two distinct layers, each petal slightly overlapping the next, creating a symmetrical and full appearance typical of sunflowers.
